ogTitle: Tara Station vs Tarampa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tara Station and Tarampa.
heading: Tara Station vs Tarampa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tara Station, Queensland and Tarampa, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tara Station has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Tarampa (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tara Station or Tarampa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tara Station has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Tarampa scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tara Station scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Tarampa scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tara Station or Tarampa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tara Station has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
